mapper.sql: t.id, t.title, t.description, t.category_id, c.name AS categoryName, t.user_id, u.nickname AS publisherNickname, u.avatar AS publisherAvatar, t.price, t.contact_phone, t.address, t.status, t.urgent, t.deadline, t.view_count, t.create_time, t.update_time
ta.user_id AS acceptorId, ua.nickname AS acceptorNickname, ta.accept_time, ta.complete_time
mapper.select:
SELECT ,
FROM task t LEFT JOIN category c ON t.category_id = c.id AND c.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN `user` u ON t.user_id = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN task_accept ta ON ta.task_id = t.id AND ta.deleted = 0 AND ta.status IN (0, 1) LEFT JOIN `user` ua ON ta.user_id = ua.id AND ua.deleted = 0 WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.deleted = 0

SELECT t.id, t.title, t.price, t.status, t.view_count, t.create_time, u.nickname AS publisherName FROM task t LEFT JOIN `user` u ON t.user_id = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE t.deleted = 0 ORDER BY t.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
